title: Review: refactor: type cleanup and extract_* legibility
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — no correctness issues found. One API design gap: #[non_exhaustive] on SieveErrorKind should be added before v0.1 is published.
Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Code is clean after two fix passes. extract_comparator edge case (non-Str following :comparator) has different but equally correct behavior vs. original — both produce the same end result since Tags in remaining are ignored by collect_two_string_lists. No real bugs found.
